title: Immersion (virtual reality)
body: In virtual reality (VR), immersion is the perception of being physically present in a non-physical world. The perception is created by surrounding the user of the VR system in images, sound or other stimuli that provide an engrossing total environment.
categories: Articles with unsourced statements from December 2024
